ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train service */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train service */,
  "train_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to each train service */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route taken by the train */,
  "source_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source station of the train */,
  "destination_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination station of the train */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of train (e.g., EMU, Express) */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the train can accommodate */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train operator responsible for the train service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the train details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the train details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_source_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_destination_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Total distance of the route */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated time taken to complete the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., circular, linear) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the route details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the route details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each station */,
  "station_address" TEXT /* Full address of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the station details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the station details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train service */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the train departs from the source station */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the train arrives at the destination station */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days on which the train operates (e.g., Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, etc.) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the schedule becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the schedule ends */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Current status of the schedule (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the schedule details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the schedule details were last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, maintenance, customer service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the train operator */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact person's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the operator details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the operator details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the maintenance details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the maintenance details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_maintenance_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "delay_date" TEXT /* Date when the delay occurred */,
  "delay_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the delay */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the delay details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the delay details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_delays_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stations" (
  "route_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route-station entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "station_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the station in the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the route-station details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the route-station details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stations_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user-role details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user-role details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
